subject: Restore an accidentally-withdrawn submission
body: We accidentally withdrew our submission and need to restore it. Can you help us re-upload the paper and the supplementary file?

subject: Reassign a review - I must recuse
body: I was assigned a paper to review but must recuse myself. Could you reassign this reviewer assignment or add a reviewer?

subject: Cannot submit my review - the site is down
body: I cannot submit review because the review site keeps erroring and OpenReview is down. My meta-review will be late.

subject: Confirming the full paper submission deadline
body: Could you confirm the exact submission deadline and the abstract deadline, and whether they are Anywhere on Earth?

subject: Possible double-blind anonymity violation
body: I believe a submission violates double-blind anonymity: it includes identifying information and a link that de-anonymizes the authors.

subject: Correcting the author list and order
body: We need to add an author and fix the author order on our submission. Please update the author list and correct the co-author metadata.

subject: Appealing the review decision
body: We would like to appeal the decision on our paper. The reviews were unfair and our rebuttal was ignored; please reconsider our paper given the poor review quality.

subject: Question about page limit and appendix formatting
body: Is the page limit strict, and does the appendix count toward it? We want to confirm the formatting checklist and the template requirements.

subject: DBLP and Semantic Scholar profile missing
body: The system says my DBLP and Semantic Scholar profile is missing. How do I add my Google Scholar profile and complete the subject area and conflict-of-interest info?

subject: Appealing a desk rejection
body: Our paper was desk-rejected over a formatting issue. We would like to appeal the desk reject and have the desk rejection reconsidered.

subject: Please reopen the paper bidding
body: Could you reopen the paper bidding? I missed the bidding window and want to correct my reviewer preference and bid on a few papers.

subject: Accepting the reviewer invitation
body: Thank you for the invitation to serve on the program committee. I accept the invitation. Could you resend the link so I can reactivate it?

subject: Volunteering to review; interested in an area chair role
body: I would like to volunteer to review this year and would be happy to serve as an area chair or on the senior program committee. I can take on more papers if needed.

subject: Declining the PC invitation this year
body: I need to decline the invitation to the program committee this year due to scheduling. Please note my availability for future years.

subject: Authorship concern that may also be an anonymity issue
body: Our paper was desk-rejected and I think the review was unfair; I also worry our anonymity was broken by identifying information in the paper.
note: Ambiguous across the appeals_integrity family (desk-reject / decision-appeal / anonymity) - all owned by the Diversity & Ethics Chair, so the assignment is stable whichever wins.

subject: Formatting error or a system bug?
body: The portal rejected our PDF upload with a formatting error about the template and margins. Is this a page limit / formatting problem on our side or a bug?
note: Ambiguous across the submission_compliance family (format-policy vs upload-help) - both owned by the Program Chair.

subject: A quick question about my review assignment and bidding
body: Hello, I have a quick question about my review assignment and the bidding process, and was not sure who to ask.
note: Ambiguous across the review_workflow family (reviewer-assignment vs paper-bidding) - both owned by the Local Arrangements Chair.
